news.india_relevance: As a major net oil importer, any escalation at Iran's primary export terminal directly impacts India's fiscal deficit and inflation.

Connects geopolitical military action to domestic fuel price stability.

news.title: India fast-tracks fertiliser imports to cushion kharif season from West Asia supply shock
